prompt.value:
<image>
You are an audio-visual event localization model.
Given the video and audio, localize all audio-visual events.

Output a JSON list. Each element must have:
  "event": event label (string)
  "start": six time tokens (4-digit integer part, <tdot>, 1-digit decimal)
  "end":   six time tokens (same format)
Example: [{"event": "dog barking", "start": "<t0><t0><t1><t2><tdot><t3>", "end": "<t0><t0><t4><t5><tdot><t6>"}]
